skills.name: self-improving-agent
skills.description: Built-in self-improvement loop. Use to record non-trivial failures, user corrections, and reusable best practices into structured learnings.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Guide for creating and updating effective skills. Use when the user wants to add a new skill or improve an existing skill.

skills.name: skill-installer
skills.description: 从 curated 目录或公共 GitHub 仓库发现并安装 Skills。仅在用户明确请求列出可安装项、安装、更新，或调用 $skill-installer 时使用。
